profiles.name: Ender 3
profiles.gcode_start:
G28 ; Home
G1 Z2.0 F3000 ; Move Z Axis up
M104 S{temp} ; Set Hotend Temperature
M140 S{bed_temp} ; Set Bed Temperature
M190 S{bed_temp} ; Wait for Bed Temperature
M109 S{temp} ; Wait for Hotend Temperature
G21 ; Set units to millimeters
G90 ; Use absolute coordinates
M82 ; Use absolute distances for extrusion
profiles.gcode_end:
G28 X0 Y0 ; Home X and Y
G1 Z{max_z} ; Raise Z
M104 S0 ; Turn off hotend
M140 S0 ; Turn off bed
M84 ; Disable motors

profiles.name: Prusa i3 MK3S+
profiles.gcode_start:
M115 U3.0.12 ; tell printer latest fw version
G21 ; set units to millimeters
M107 ; turn off fan
M104 S{temp} ; set extruder temp
M140 S{bed_temp} ; set bed temp
M190 S{bed_temp} ; wait for bed temp
M109 S{temp} ; wait for extruder temp
G28 ; home all axes
G1 Z2.0 F3000 ; lift nozzle
G92 E0 ; reset extruder
G1 F200 E3 ; extrude 3mm of filament
G92 E0 ; reset extruder again
profiles.gcode_end:
G4 ; wait
M104 S0 ; turn off extruder
M140 S0 ; turn off bed
G27 ; park extruder
M84 ; disable motors

profiles.name: Ultimaker S5
profiles.gcode_start:
;S5
G21 ; metric values
G90 ; absolute positioning
M82 ; set extruder to absolute mode
M140 S{bed_temp} ; start bed heating
M104 S{temp} ; start hotend heating
M190 S{bed_temp} ; wait for bed temperature
M109 S{temp} ; wait for hotend temperature
G28 ; home all axes
G1 Z2 F3000 ; lift nozzle
G92 E0 ; reset extruder
profiles.gcode_end:
G91 ; relative positioning
G1 E-1 F300 ; retract filament
G1 Z+0.5 E-5 X-20 Y-20 F9000 ; move print head up and retract filament
G28 X0 Y0 ; home X and Y
M84 ; disable motors
M104 S0 ; turn off hotend
M140 S0 ; turn off bed

M115 U3.4.3 ; tell printer latest fw version

G1 F200 E3 ; extrude 3mm of filament

profiles.gcode_end:
